title: 08232_Generative_Social_Choice_The_Next_Generation
positive_examples: Advances the integration of social-choice-inspired algorithms with provable fairness guarantees.
Contributes to the methodological foundations of scalable civic participation.
Enables new paradigms in democratic decision-making.
negative_examples: LLMs may favor or disfavor certain viewpoints, leading to distorted representation.
LLM-generated outputs are inherently opaque and may lack reliability.
Directly inputting user comments into the LLM could expose the process to adversarial attacks.
